  • Classes in io.vertigo.core.node.component used by io.vertigo.core.analytics
    Class
    Description
    Component
    Defines the common interface for components in the system.
    CoreComponent
    A core-component is one of tbe key concept of vertigo.
    Manager
    The manager class must be consireded as a simple marker to identify all the technical components.
